texto: ...Lance is the inevitable product of our celebrity-worshipping culture and the whole money-mad world of sports gone amok. This is the Golden Age of fraud, an era of general willingness to ignore and justify the wrongdoings of the rich and powerful, which makes every lie bigger and widens its destructive path.
explicacao: Citação de Reed Albergotti sobre temas ligados a negocios. “...Lance is the inevitable product of our celebrity-worshipping culture and the whole money-mad w…” articula negocios, fraud, society em registro de negocios, com relevância para contextos como society e wrongdoing.
